tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
storm-control broadcast level 10.00 5.00
storm-control multicast level 10.00 5.00
storm-control unicast level 10.00 5.00
end
write memory
show running-config interface GigabitEthernet0/1"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"interface GigabitEthernet0/1
storm-control broadcast level 10.00 5.00
storm-control multicast level 10.00 5.00
storm-control unicast level 10.00 5.00
end
write memory
show running-config interface GigabitEthernet0/1"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
terminal length 0
configure terminal
interface Gi0/1
storm-control broadcast level 10 5
storm-control multicast level 10 5
storm-control unicast level 10 5
exit
end
write memory
show running-config interface Gi0/1"}
